summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bilay Demir Dograma website. Backend APIs working perfectly on localhost, but frontend-backend integration failing due to public URL deployment issues.

deployment_issues.issue: All API endpoints return 404 - public URL not properly configured
deployment_issues.impact: Frontend cannot connect to backend in production

integration_issues.issue: CORS errors when accessing public backend URL with credentials
integration_issues.details: Access-Control-Allow-Origin wildcard '*' conflicts with withCredentials: true

integration_issues.issue: Login fails due to backend connectivity issues
integration_issues.error_message: Bir hata olustu. Lutfen tekrar deneyin.

integration_issues.issue: Services and testimonials not loading (0 cards displayed)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix public URL deployment configuration. The backend is running perfectly on localhost:8001 but the public URL (https://bilay-demir-dograma.preview.emergentagent.com) returns 404 for all endpoints. This prevents frontend-backend integration. Also fix CORS configuration to allow credentials with specific origins instead of wildcard.
